criterion: P2.2 closure criterion 3: external-user e2e smoke — fresh $HOME, install, boole.status idle, boole.mine (zero-cycle), boole.status completed — captured envelope shapes.
claimBoundary: closed local smoke; not public-network mining
ineligibilityReasons: single local boole-mcp process driving an in-process zero-cycle mining bundle
notes: Volatile fields (settings_path, planned_content, build/version strings, absolute paths, ephemeral port) are intentionally excluded; only deterministic envelope shapes are pinned.

The live boole-mcp binary is verified to produce these exact envelopes by crates/boole-mcp/tests/mining_tool_surface.rs (spawns the binary, drives /mcp/invoke); this transcript pins the documented shapes so the doc and the contract cannot drift.

boole.mine runs run_mining_loop with max_cycles = 0, so every protocol counter is 0 and no real mining work (driver/verifier/Lean) is performed — this is a contract smoke, not a mining-productivity claim.
